MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-28-2007 IN 206, DEFENDANT JOPHREY YVES-BISHOP'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/2/07 IS CONTINUED TO 4/9/07 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:00 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON 3/29/07 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT 218. THE COURT ORDERED THAT THERE IS TO BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE IN THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT IS TO POST ONE WEEK'S RENT. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D.
